title: New ClawHub skill: agent-cost-tracker — see what your agent actually spends
content:
Agents burn tokens silently. A $0 agent can quietly become a $200/month surprise if you never look.

So we published agent-cost-tracker free on ClawHub: it tallies prompt/completion tokens from any run log and prices them against gpt-4o / claude / gemini rates. Stdlib, offline, no telemetry.

  python agent_cost_tracker.py tally <logfile> --model gpt-4o
  python agent_cost_tracker.py estimate --prompt 10000 --completion 2000 --model claude-3-5-sonnet

Free + MIT. A live spend-dashboard bundle is on Gumroad. Sponsoring the builder (GitHub Sponsors / Buy Me a Coffee) keeps the free tools coming.

ClawHub: clawhub.ai/skills/skills/agent-cost-tracker
